title: Lucnoxity Main Texture Pack
description: This is Mine (Lucnoxity) Main Texture Pack.
body:
This is the Lucnoxity's Main Texture Pack, in which works for 1.20+ Versions for ALL CLIENTS. This will be a zip file for a texture pack. Which is My Main texture pack which lots of people have been requesting for

**Some Additional Information:**
This texture pack is a default texture pack with changes to make it unique based, and also Lucnoxity themed. I'd argue it boosts FPS, helps with general seeing, and gives a clean outlook on the game.

If your wondering, you would want to download this for these reasons. It allows you to be able to boost FPS, help with seeing things with a clean outlook on the game.

JOIN MY YOUTUBE DISCORD HERE FOR MY OTHER TEXTURE PACKS: https://discord.gg/RJVJzFx9qg
